top_signals.title: Crypto market treads thin ice following Warsh FOMC, Trump Iran comments
top_signals.summary: Markets wobbled after mixed comments from President Trump on the Iran peace deal and Fed Chair Kevin Warsh signaling a new direction from the Federal Reserve.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Florida man pleads guilty for promoting $1.8B ‘HyperFund’ crypto fraud
top_signals.summary: Rodney “Bitcoin Rodney” Burton faces a maximum sentence of five years in federal prison for conspiracy to operate an unlicensed money transmitting business.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Indoor Playground Price Rises Add to Costs for British Families
top_signals.summary: After recovering from the pandemic, soft-play centers are hiking prices to cushion the blow of soaring costs.
